user.title: Connect to Hailo Ollama
user.description: Enter connection details for your Hailo-Ollama Server.

pick_model.title: Select Model
pick_model.description: Models found on your Hailo device:

data_description.streaming: Enable for token-by-token streaming. Disable for a single response (simpler but you wait for the full reply).
data_description.show_thinking: When enabled, reasoning inside <think> tags will be included in the response. Disable to return only the final answer.

list_models.name: List Models
list_models.description: Returns the list of models available on the Hailo-Ollama server.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: ID of the Hailo Ollama integration entry to query. Defaults to the first configured entry.

pull_model.name: Pull Model
pull_model.description: Downloads a model to the Hailo-Ollama server.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: ID of the Hailo Ollama integration entry to use. Defaults to the first configured entry.

init.title: Reconfigure Hailo Ollama
init.description: Update the model and settings for this integration.

data_description.streaming: Enable for token-by-token streaming. Disable for a single response (simpler but you wait for the full reply).
data_description.show_thinking: When enabled, reasoning inside <think> tags will be included in the response. Disable to return only the final answer.
